global_description: Large feline with slender, elongated body, tawny coat with black spots, small rounded head, long legs, and distinctive black tear marks from eyes to mouth. Tail is long and spotted, aiding in balance during high-speed chases.

part_details.head: Small, rounded with black tear marks from eyes to mouth
part_details.body: Slender, elongated with tawny coat and black spots
part_details.legs: Long and muscular, adapted for speed

spatial_relations: Tear marks running from eyes to mouth
